reviews.review_description: We have played this game a ton. I've uninstalled and reinstalled this game multiple times. It will not update. We can no longer get into the game due to a "New update" banner you can't pass. The game shows up to date.

The reason why you cannot play the game via  the message (NEW UPDATE) is because the game has shutdown their servers.the Due to bankruptcy, so please do not give the game a bad rating it just doesn't work anymore.

I am a OG player and I have seen this game evolve into what it is now and can’t say I’m happy. community is so toxic and nobody’s nice anymore,everything is duped and it’s way too easy. developers I am glad you’re shutting the game down, people need to find a new game or way to play a fun game ￼on VR and this had potential but got way of track.

Legodude out✌🏻
I really don’t want this game to be gone it is one of my favorite games and now it’s gone :((((((((((((((( I would buy a $20 bundle if you bring it back :(

Hi! I love this game even though I haven’t gotten very far into it. It is one of the most fun games I’ve played in my life. I’m really sad too hear that it’s shutting down. I may not have been very good or a very high level in this game but it was still fun and enjoyable to play. Even if I was playing alone. There was always someone to talk to in game and just have fun. I really hope you guys end up coming back better than ever!!!!

I am a long-term player of backgrounds and since it shut down I just haven't had as much fun on VR this game was always a game to play if I was bored and it always lightened up my day no matter what it had a good community and no one's denying that I love the game and I truly hope it comes back
I played the game since the beginning and it was soooo good but sadly it had gone the wrong path. I think that it was a good decision to shut the servers down and not try to steer a sinking ship.
I was the #1 player in this game. I hope someday they bring it back as something different or smaller.

The original map was so much better, I don’t doubt that the team behind this worked so hard on the maps, but the original one was my favorite and the skill tree, where you can unlock new weapons is one thing that makes the new version of the game not fun. I used to play this game when it was in beta and it was so much fun but now the game is just plain boring and the ore selling makes no sense why it’s even in the game. The new version of the game is alright but the old version was way better.

reviews.review_title: Where did all the OG skins go
reviews.review_description: This was one of the very few games me and my friends played together before, we thought it was really fun to throw around bombs and put other people on fire, but now when I logged in to the game there was fricking tech tree?! I have never been so disappointed in my life, everything used to be free, and only did you guys not just remove the good old skins with the knight’s, no you guys decided it was a good idea to remove the whole OG map, why would you do that, it’s not the worst game I have played, but I’m really disappointed in what this game has become

This game has been so fun over the years, I’m so sorry it had to go 🫡

OG days were fun while they lasted. 

I could’ve had a million VR games and this one would always be the best. So long Battle Grounds
I played this game around when it first came out and at the time the game was amazing but now the game is just bad it's just not the same
I loved this game last summer the castle map and pirate map where so good. But now it’s like every other vr game and just not the same

reviews.review_title: This is the best game I’ve ever played
reviews.review_description: I have been playing this game for 350 days and I have in joyed every moment of it I am one of the best PvP players in the entire game and believe that if this game did things a little differently it could have been one of if not the best PvP vr games ever created but sadly this game is shutting down soon because it doesn’t have the funds to keep going but if anyone who is rich or famous wants to help them out please do I will never forget you battle grounds or the people I meet in the game  I will continue to play games sin studios makes long after battle grounds is gone but I’ll never forget the best game I have ever play I wish this was not the end😕

Not much to say, play it and fall in love with  smoothest movement system you'll ever see in physics based combat VR. The devs are truly built different, when vr is more mainstream and flat-screen gaming dies off, this game will be top  10
R.I.P battlegrounds, you will be missed

I loved this game i was one of the top duelers but only after three months of playing it stupid sinn studios deletes it and makes zombonk probably the worst game i had ever played it just copy's gorrila tag and call of duty with some sound effects from battlegrounds this just shows you how lazy sinn studios is but from all of the memories and how much fun i had battlegrounds is a easy five stars but i hope that sinn studios will realize how stupid they are and bring it. Back i also see all of the potential in this game but it pisses me off that after just. Three months and. Becoming one of the top duelists they delete it i log on to this game every day just to mourn it and feel the wave of nostalgia wash over me. Please bring it back.
(ShadowyMacaw)
